2604.05923.title: The UNDO Flip-Flop: A Controlled Probe for Reversible Semantic State Management in State Space Model
2604.05923.paper_summary: State space models (SSMs) have been shown to possess the theoretical capacity to model both star-free sequential tasks and bounded hierarchical structures Sarrof et al. (2024). However, formal expressivity results do not guarantee that gradient-based optimisation will reliably discover the corresponding solutions. Existing benchmarks probe either monotonic state tracking, as in the standard Flip-Flop task, or structural nesting, as in the Dyck languages, but neither isolates reversible semantic state retrieval. We introduce the UNDO Flip-Flop task to fill this gap. By extending the standard Flip-Flop with an UNDO, the task requires a model to maintain an implicit bounded stack and recover historical states under non-monotonic update sequences. We evaluate one-layer and two-layer Mamba-2 under this framework. Both variants fail to acquire the provably expressible stack-based rollback mechanism, converging instead on a local toggle heuristic that inverts the current state rather than retrieving stored history. Under an adversarial retraction pressure test held within the training length distribution, the two-layer model collapses to 41.10% accuracy, which is below random chance. The results confirm systematic rather than incidental failure. Causal ablation shows that the bottleneck lies in retrieval, not storage. These results draw a clear line between what an architecture can in principle represent and what gradient descent reliably learns, a distinction that theoretical expressivity analyses alone cannot capture.
2604.05923.paper_summary_zh: 狀態空間模型（SSMs）已被證明具有理論能力來建模無星序列任務和有界層次結構 Sarrof et al. (2024)。然而，正式的表達能力結果並不保證基於梯度的優化能夠可靠地發現相應的解決方案。現有的基準測試探討了單調狀態跟踪，例如標準的翻轉-翻轉任務，或結構嵌套，例如 Dyck 語言，但都沒有孤立可逆的語義狀態檢索。我們引入了 UNDO 翻轉-翻轉任務來填補這一空白。通過擴展標準翻轉-翻轉任務並加入 UNDO，該任務要求模型維持一個隱式的有界堆疊並在非單調更新序列下恢復歷史狀態。我們在這一框架下評估了一層和兩層的 Mamba-2。這兩種變體都未能獲得可證明的基於堆疊的回滾機制，而是收斂於一種局部切換啟發式，該啟發式反轉當前狀態而不是檢索存儲的歷史。在訓練長度分佈內進行的對抗性撤回壓力測試下，兩層模型的準確率崩潰至 41.10%，低於隨機機會。結果確認了系統性而非偶然性的失敗。因果消融顯示瓶頸在於檢索，而非存儲。這些結果清楚地劃分了架構在原則上可以表示的內容與梯度下降可靠學習的內容之間的區別，這一區別僅靠理論表達能力分析無法捕捉。
2604.05923.author: Hongxu Zhou et.al.
